title: Fabric Utility
description: Fabric Utility is a mod with chunk and subchunk tagging, protected area support, player nicknames, configurable entity petting, and a Ban Hammer item NBT feature.
body: --- Fabric Utility is a Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric utility mod with chunk and subchunk tagging, protected area support, player nicknames, configurable entity petting, and a Ban Hammer item NBT feature. Use `/tagchunk` to mark chunks or subchunks with tags like invulnerability, optionally adding username bypass values. The petting system can be customized through Mod Menu or server config commands, including blocked entities, custom tag-based sounds, and particle settings. The mod also includes `/nick` commands for player nicknames and admin controls. For the most complete and up-to-date information, configuration details, and ongoing updates, refer to the [Github](https://github.com/SuperHeroPuppy/fabric_utility) repository ---
